He says the Rockets always look great in the regular season, but then stall in the playoffs. He says he will be working to make them less predictable.

The second is that he is going to add actions and player movement, less standing around. He says there's a time for iso plays, but they need to mix it up, especially in the playoffs when teams can prepare and adjust to stop it with traps.
